name: Argonaut (ii) (SS-475)
events: 10 Mar 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) arrived at Newport Rhode Island from Portsmouth, New Hampshire for torpedo trials.
14 Mar 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN), arrived at New London, Connecticut.
27 Mar 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
8 Apr 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
14 Apr 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) departed from Portsmouth bound for Key West.
19 Apr 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida.
20 Apr 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
21 Apr 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
23 Apr 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
26 Apr 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
27 Apr 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
1 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
2 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
3 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
7 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
8 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
9 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
10 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) conducted exercises off Key West.
13 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) departed from Key West bound for the Panama Canal Zone.
17 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) arrived in the Panama Canal Zone.
26 May 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) departed the Panama Canal Zone for Pearl Harbor.
11 Jun 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
28 Jun 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt) departed from Pearl Harbor for her 1st war patrol. She was ordered to Saipan.
10 Jul 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt) topped up at Saipan. She then proceeded to her patrol area in the East China and Yellow Seas.
12 Aug 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt) sank a Japanese sailing vessel with gunfire at the entrance to the Yellow Sea in position 34°22'N, 125°33'E.
21 Aug 1945 USS Argonaut (ii) (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Schmidt) ended her 1st war patrol at Guam.

1 Sep 1945 The submarine tender USS Fulton (T/Capt. A.R. St. Angelo, USN) and the submarines USS Manta (T/Lt.Cdr. E.P. Madley, USN), USS Dentuda (T/Lt.Cdr. E.E. Conrad, USN), USS Argonaut (T/Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) and USS Diablo (T/Cdr. G.G. Matheson, USN) departed Guam for Pearl Harbor where they arrived on 10 September 1945.
11 Sep 1945 USS Icefish (T/Cdr. R.W. Peterson, USN) departed Pearl Harbor for San Francisco.
She was in company with USS Argonaut (T/Cdr. J.S. Schmidt, USN) and USS Diablo (T/Cdr. G.G. Matheson, USN) which were to proceed to Balboa, Panama Canal Zone.
[It is currently not known to us when they parted company with each other.]
